description: 100 stratified examples from Spider dev set (16 databases)

test_cases.question: Show the name of the teacher for the math course.
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT T3.Name FROM course_arrange AS T1 JOIN course AS T2 ON T1.Course_ID  =  T2.Course_ID JOIN teacher AS T3 ON T1.Teacher_ID  =  T3.Teacher_ID WHERE T2.Course  =  "Math"

test_cases.question: What are the countries that have cartoons on TV that were written by Todd Casey?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT T1.country FROM TV_Channel AS T1 JOIN cartoon AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.Channel WHERE T2.written_by  =  'Todd Casey'

test_cases.question: Find the government form name and total population for each government form whose average life expectancy is longer than 72.
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT sum(Population) ,  GovernmentForm FROM country GROUP BY GovernmentForm HAVING avg(LifeExpectancy)  >  72

test_cases.question: What is the maximum capacity and the average of all stadiums ?
test_cases.gold_sql: select max(capacity), average from stadium

test_cases.question: What is the record company used by the greatest number of orchestras?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT Record_Company FROM orchestra GROUP BY Record_Company ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1

test_cases.question: Show all document ids, names and the number of paragraphs in each document.
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT T1.document_id ,  T2.document_name ,  count(*) FROM Paragraphs AS T1 JOIN Documents AS T2 ON T1.document_id  =  T2.document_id GROUP BY T1.document_id

test_cases.question: Find the average grade of all students who have some friends.
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT avg(grade) FROM Highschooler WHERE id IN (SELECT T1.student_id FROM Friend AS T1 JOIN Highschooler AS T2 ON T1.student_id  =  T2.id)

test_cases.question: What is the birth date of the poker player with the lowest earnings?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT T1.Birth_Date FROM people AS T1 JOIN poker_player AS T2 ON T1.People_ID  =  T2.People_ID ORDER BY T2.Earnings ASC LIMIT 1

test_cases.question: What is the money rank of the tallest poker player?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT T2.Money_Rank FROM people AS T1 JOIN poker_player AS T2 ON T1.People_ID  =  T2.People_ID ORDER BY T1.Height DESC LIMIT 1

test_cases.question: What are the song titles and singer names?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT T2.Title ,  T1.Name FROM singer AS T1 JOIN song AS T2 ON T1.Singer_ID  =  T2.Singer_ID

test_cases.question: Show the names of high schoolers who have at least 3 friends.
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT T2.name FROM Friend AS T1 JOIN Highschooler AS T2 ON T1.student_id  =  T2.id GROUP BY T1.student_id HAVING count(*)  >=  3

test_cases.question: Which are the car makers which produce at least 2 models and more than 3 car makers ? List the id and the maker .
test_cases.gold_sql: select t1.id ,  t1.maker from car_makers as t1 join model_list as t2 on t1.id  =  t2.maker group by t1.id having count(*)  >=  2 intersect select t1.id ,  t1.maker from car_makers as t1 join model_list as t2 on t1.id  =  t2.maker join car_names as t3 on t2.model  =  t3.model group by t1.id having count(*)  >  3;

test_cases.question: Return the document id, template id, and description for the document with the name Robbin CV.
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT document_id ,  template_id ,  Document_Description FROM Documents WHERE document_name  =  "Robbin CV"

test_cases.question: Which continent has the most diverse languages?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT T1.Continent FROM country AS T1 JOIN countrylanguage AS T2 ON T1.Code  =  T2.CountryCode GROUP BY T1.Continent ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1

test_cases.question: What is the code of airport that has the highest number of flights?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT T1.AirportCode FROM AIRPORTS AS T1 JOIN FLIGHTS AS T2 ON T1.AirportCode  =  T2.DestAirport OR T1.AirportCode  =  T2.SourceAirport GROUP BY T1.AirportCode ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

test_cases.question: Which owner has paid the largest amount of money in total for their dogs? Show the owner id and zip code.
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT T1.owner_id ,  T1.zip_code FROM Owners AS T1 JOIN Dogs AS T2 ON T1.owner_id  =  T2.owner_id JOIN Treatments AS T3 ON T2.dog_id  =  T3.dog_id GROUP BY T1.owner_id ORDER BY sum(T3.cost_of_treatment) DESC LIMIT 1

test_cases.question: Give the nationality that is most common across all people.
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT Nationality FROM people GROUP BY Nationality ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1

test_cases.question: Please show the record formats of orchestras in ascending order of count.
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT Major_Record_Format FROM orchestra GROUP BY Major_Record_Format ORDER BY COUNT(*) ASC

test_cases.question: Give the names of the nations that were founded after 1950.
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT Name FROM country WHERE IndepYear  >  1950

test_cases.question: Find the average age of students who do not have any pet .
test_cases.gold_sql: select avg(age) from student where stuid not in (select stuid from has_pet)

test_cases.question: What is the name and capacity for the stadium with the highest average attendance?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT name ,  capacity FROM stadium ORDER BY average DESC LIMIT 1

test_cases.question: Show names of teachers and the number of courses they teach.
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT T2.Name ,  COUNT(*) FROM course_arrange AS T1 JOIN teacher AS T2 ON T1.Teacher_ID  =  T2.Teacher_ID GROUP BY T2.Name

test_cases.question: What are the names of the teachers and the courses they teach in ascending alphabetical order by the name of the teacher?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT T3.Name ,  T2.Course FROM course_arrange AS T1 JOIN course AS T2 ON T1.Course_ID  =  T2.Course_ID JOIN teacher AS T3 ON T1.Teacher_ID  =  T3.Teacher_ID ORDER BY T3.Name

test_cases.question: Find the number of players for each hand type.
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT count(*) ,  hand FROM players GROUP BY hand

test_cases.question: What is the document id with 1 to 2 paragraphs?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT document_id FROM Paragraphs GROUP BY document_id HAVING count(*) BETWEEN 1 AND 2

test_cases.question: What is the continent name which Anguilla belongs to?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT Continent FROM country WHERE Name  =  "Anguilla"

test_cases.question: Show different hometown of teachers and the number of teachers from each hometown.
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT Hometown ,  COUNT(*) FROM teacher GROUP BY Hometown

test_cases.question: Find the districts in which there are both shops selling less than 3000 products and shops selling more than 10000 products.
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT district FROM shop WHERE Number_products  <  3000 INTERSECT SELECT district FROM shop WHERE Number_products  >  10000

test_cases.question: What are all the song names by singers who are older than average?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT song_name FROM singer WHERE age  >  (SELECT avg(age) FROM singer)

test_cases.question: Which professional did not operate any treatment on dogs? List the professional's id, role and email.
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT professional_id ,  role_code ,  email_address FROM Professionals EXCEPT SELECT T1.professional_id ,  T1.role_code ,  T1.email_address FROM Professionals AS T1 JOIN Treatments AS T2 ON T1.professional_id  =  T2.professional_id

test_cases.question: What is all the information about hiring?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT * FROM hiring

test_cases.question: List the names of teachers in ascending order of age.
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT Name FROM teacher ORDER BY Age ASC

test_cases.question: What are the package options of all tv channels that are not playing any cartoons directed by Ben Jones?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT package_option FROM TV_Channel WHERE id NOT IN (SELECT channel FROM cartoon WHERE directed_by  =  'Ben Jones')

test_cases.question: Which flight numbers correspond to United Airlines flights?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT T1.FlightNo FROM FLIGHTS AS T1 JOIN AIRLINES AS T2 ON T2.uid  =  T1.Airline WHERE T2.Airline  =  "United Airlines"

test_cases.question: Return the version numbers and template type codes of templates with a version number greater than 5.
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT version_number ,  template_type_code FROM Templates WHERE version_number  >  5

test_cases.question: What are the ids for templates that are not used in any documents?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT template_id FROM Templates EXCEPT SELECT template_id FROM Documents

test_cases.question: What grade is Kyle in?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT grade FROM Highschooler WHERE name  =  "Kyle"

test_cases.question: How many concerts are there in year 2014 or 2015?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT count(*) FROM concert WHERE YEAR  =  2014 OR YEAR  =  2015

test_cases.question: How many degrees does the engineering department have?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT count(*) FROM Departments AS T1 JOIN Degree_Programs AS T2 ON T1.department_id  =  T2.department_id WHERE T1.department_name  =  'engineer'

test_cases.question: List the name of singers that do not have any song.
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT Name FROM singer WHERE Singer_ID NOT IN (SELECT Singer_ID FROM song)

test_cases.question: Give the airline with abbreviation 'UAL'.
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT Airline FROM AIRLINES WHERE Abbreviation  =  "UAL"

test_cases.question: How many dog pets are raised by female students?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT count(*) FROM student AS T1 JOIN has_pet AS T2 ON T1.stuid  =  T2.stuid JOIN pets AS T3 ON T2.petid  =  T3.petid WHERE T1.sex  =  'F' AND T3.pettype  =  'dog'

test_cases.question: What are the names of the employees who never received any evaluation?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT name FROM employee WHERE Employee_ID NOT IN (SELECT Employee_ID FROM evaluation)

test_cases.question: Which languages are spoken by only one country in republic governments?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT T2.Language FROM country AS T1 JOIN countrylanguage AS T2 ON T1.Code  =  T2.CountryCode WHERE T1.GovernmentForm  =  "Republic" GROUP BY T2.Language HAVING COUNT(*)  =  1

test_cases.question: Show the hometowns shared by at least two teachers.
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT Hometown FROM teacher GROUP BY Hometown HAVING COUNT(*)  >=  2

test_cases.question: What are the names of the people who teach math courses?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT T3.Name FROM course_arrange AS T1 JOIN course AS T2 ON T1.Course_ID  =  T2.Course_ID JOIN teacher AS T3 ON T1.Teacher_ID  =  T3.Teacher_ID WHERE T2.Course  =  "Math"

test_cases.question: What are the ids and names of each document, as well as the number of paragraphs in each?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT T1.document_id ,  T2.document_name ,  count(*) FROM Paragraphs AS T1 JOIN Documents AS T2 ON T1.document_id  =  T2.document_id GROUP BY T1.document_id

test_cases.question: What are the names of cities in Europe for which English is not the official language?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T2.Name FROM country AS T1 JOIN city AS T2 ON T2.CountryCode  =  T1.Code WHERE T1.Continent  =  'Europe' AND T1.Name NOT IN (SELECT T3.Name FROM country AS T3 JOIN countrylanguage AS T4 ON T3.Code  =  T4.CountryCode WHERE T4.IsOfficial  =  'T' AND T4.Language  =  'English')

test_cases.question: Count the number of countries in Asia.
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT count(*) FROM country WHERE continent  =  "Asia"

test_cases.question: What is the name and id of the department with the most number of degrees ?
test_cases.gold_sql: select t2.department_name ,  t1.department_id from degree_programs as t1 join departments as t2 on t1.department_id  =  t2.department_id group by t1.department_id order by count(*) desc limit 1

test_cases.question: What are the names and birth dates of people, ordered by their names in alphabetical order?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT Name ,  Birth_Date FROM people ORDER BY Name ASC

test_cases.question: How many cars has over 6 cylinders?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CARS_DATA WHERE Cylinders  >  6;

test_cases.question: How many cars have more than 4 cylinders?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT count(*) FROM CARS_DATA WHERE Cylinders  >  4;

test_cases.question: For all of the 4 cylinder cars, which model has the most horsepower?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT T1.Model FROM CAR_NAMES AS T1 JOIN CARS_DATA AS T2 ON T1.MakeId  =  T2.Id WHERE T2.Cylinders  =  4 ORDER BY T2.horsepower DESC LIMIT 1;

test_cases.question: Which shops run with no employees? Find the shop names
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT name FROM shop WHERE shop_id NOT IN (SELECT shop_id FROM hiring)

test_cases.question: Return the money rank of the poker player with the greatest height.
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT T2.Money_Rank FROM people AS T1 JOIN poker_player AS T2 ON T1.People_ID  =  T2.People_ID ORDER BY T1.Height DESC LIMIT 1

test_cases.question: Show all document names using templates with template type code BK.
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT T2.document_name FROM Templates AS T1 JOIN Documents AS T2 ON T1.template_id  =  T2.template_id WHERE T1.template_type_code  =  "BK"

test_cases.question: What language is predominantly spoken in Aruba?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT T2.Language FROM country AS T1 JOIN countrylanguage AS T2 ON T1.Code  =  T2.CountryCode WHERE T1.Name  =  "Aruba" ORDER BY Percentage DESC LIMIT 1

test_cases.question: Return the number of flights departing from Aberdeen.
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT count(*) FROM FLIGHTS AS T1 JOIN AIRPORTS AS T2 ON T1.SourceAirport  =  T2.AirportCode WHERE T2.City  =  "Aberdeen"

test_cases.question: Which airline has most number of flights?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT T1.Airline FROM AIRLINES AS T1 JOIN FLIGHTS AS T2 ON T1.uid  =  T2.Airline GROUP BY T1.Airline ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

test_cases.question: What are the id and names of the countries which have more than 3 car makers or produce the 'fiat' model?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT T1.countryId ,  T1.CountryName FROM Countries AS T1 JOIN CAR_MAKERS AS T2 ON T1.CountryId  =  T2.Country GROUP BY T1.countryId HAVING count(*)  >  3 UNION SELECT T1.countryId ,  T1.CountryName FROM Countries AS T1 JOIN CAR_MAKERS AS T2 ON T1.CountryId  =  T2.Country JOIN MODEL_LIST AS T3 ON T2.Id  =  T3.Maker WHERE T3.Model  =  'fiat';

test_cases.question: For students who have pets , how many pets does each student have ? list their ids instead of names .
test_cases.gold_sql: select count(*) ,  t1.stuid from student as t1 join has_pet as t2 on t1.stuid  =  t2.stuid group by t1.stuid

test_cases.question: Who are enrolled in 2 degree programs in one semester? List the first name, middle name and last name and the id.
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT T1.first_name ,  T1.middle_name ,  T1.last_name ,  T1.student_id FROM Students AS T1 JOIN Student_Enrolment AS T2 ON T1.student_id  =  T2.student_id GROUP BY T1.student_id HAVING count(*)  =  2

test_cases.question: What is the average and maximum capacities for all stadiums ?
test_cases.gold_sql: select avg(capacity) ,  max(capacity) from stadium

test_cases.question: List the names of poker players ordered by the final tables made in ascending order.
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT T1.Name FROM people AS T1 JOIN poker_player AS T2 ON T1.People_ID  =  T2.People_ID ORDER BY T2.Final_Table_Made

test_cases.question: What are the ids of all tv channels that have more than 2 TV channels?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT id FROM tv_channel GROUP BY country HAVING count(*)  >  2

test_cases.question: How many unique languages are spoken in the world?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT count(DISTINCT LANGUAGE) FROM countrylanguage

test_cases.question: What are the names of the teachers whose courses have not been arranged?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT Name FROM teacher WHERE Teacher_id NOT IN (SELECT Teacher_id FROM course_arrange)

test_cases.question: Return the owner id, first name and last name of the owner who has the most dogs.
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT T1.owner_id ,  T2.first_name ,  T2.last_name FROM Dogs AS T1 JOIN Owners AS T2 ON T1.owner_id  =  T2.owner_id GROUP BY T1.owner_id ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

test_cases.question: What is the average age for all students who do not own any pets ?
test_cases.gold_sql: select avg(age) from student where stuid not in (select stuid from has_pet)

test_cases.question: How many flights does airline 'JetBlue Airways' have?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT count(*) FROM FLIGHTS AS T1 JOIN AIRLINES AS T2 ON T1.Airline  =  T2.uid WHERE T2.Airline = "JetBlue Airways"

test_cases.question: What are the names of the teachers and how many courses do they teach?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT T2.Name ,  COUNT(*) FROM course_arrange AS T1 JOIN teacher AS T2 ON T1.Teacher_ID  =  T2.Teacher_ID GROUP BY T2.Name

test_cases.question: What is the code of the country with the most players?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT country_code FROM players GROUP BY country_code ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

test_cases.question: Which employee received the biggest bonus? Give me the employee name.
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT t1.name FROM employee AS t1 JOIN evaluation AS t2 ON t1.Employee_ID  =  t2.Employee_ID ORDER BY t2.bonus DESC LIMIT 1

test_cases.question: List the first name of all the professionals along with the description of the treatment they have done.
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.first_name ,  T3.treatment_type_description FROM professionals AS T1 JOIN Treatments AS T2 ON T1.professional_id  =  T2.professional_id JOIN Treatment_types AS T3 ON T2.treatment_type_code  =  T3.treatment_type_code

test_cases.question: Return the codes of countries that do not speak English and do not have Republics for governments.
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT Code FROM country WHERE GovernmentForm != "Republic" EXCEPT SELECT CountryCode FROM countrylanguage WHERE LANGUAGE  =  "English"

test_cases.question: What country is Jetblue Airways affiliated with?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT Country FROM AIRLINES WHERE Airline  =  "JetBlue Airways"

test_cases.question: Show the names of students who have a grade higher than 5 and have at least 2 friends.
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT T2.name FROM Friend AS T1 JOIN Highschooler AS T2 ON T1.student_id  =  T2.id WHERE T2.grade  >  5 GROUP BY T1.student_id HAVING count(*)  >=  2

test_cases.question: Find the average life expectancy and total population for each continent where the average life expectancy is shorter than 72?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT sum(Population) ,  avg(LifeExpectancy) ,  Continent FROM country GROUP BY Continent HAVING avg(LifeExpectancy)  <  72

test_cases.question: What is the full name of each car maker, along with its id and how many models it produces?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT T1.FullName ,  T1.Id ,  count(*) FROM CAR_MAKERS AS T1 JOIN MODEL_LIST AS T2 ON T1.Id  =  T2.Maker GROUP BY T1.Id;

test_cases.question: Return the number of flights arriving in Aberdeen.
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT count(*) FROM FLIGHTS AS T1 JOIN AIRPORTS AS T2 ON T1.DestAirport  =  T2.AirportCode WHERE T2.City  =  "Aberdeen"

test_cases.question: How many countries does each continent have? List the continent id, continent name and the number of countries.
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT T1.ContId ,  T1.Continent ,  count(*) FROM CONTINENTS AS T1 JOIN COUNTRIES AS T2 ON T1.ContId  =  T2.Continent GROUP BY T1.ContId;

test_cases.question: What is the most common nationality of people?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT Nationality FROM people GROUP BY Nationality ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1

test_cases.question: How many car models were produced by the maker with full name American Motor Company?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT count(*) FROM CAR_MAKERS AS T1 JOIN MODEL_LIST AS T2 ON T1.Id  =  T2.Maker WHERE T1.FullName  =  'American Motor Company';

test_cases.question: Show all the grades of the high schoolers.
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT grade FROM Highschooler

test_cases.question: Which first names are used for professionals or owners but are not used as dog names?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT first_name FROM Professionals UNION SELECT first_name FROM Owners EXCEPT SELECT name FROM Dogs

test_cases.question: What is the average edispl for all volvos?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT avg(T2.edispl) FROM CAR_NAMES AS T1 JOIN CARS_DATA AS T2 ON T1.MakeId  =  T2.Id WHERE T1.Model  =  'volvo';

test_cases.question: List the Episode of all TV series sorted by rating.
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT Episode FROM TV_series ORDER BY rating

test_cases.question: Show all template type codes that are not used by any document.
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT template_type_code FROM Templates EXCEPT SELECT template_type_code FROM Templates AS T1 JOIN Documents AS T2 ON T1.template_id  =  T2.template_id

test_cases.question: What are the different template type codes?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT DISTINCT template_type_code FROM Templates

test_cases.question: What is the description of the department whose name has the substring the computer?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT department_description FROM Departments WHERE department_name LIKE '%computer%'

test_cases.question: How many templates do we have?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT count(*) FROM Templates

test_cases.question: What are the final tables made and best finishes for all poker players?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT Final_Table_Made ,  Best_Finish FROM poker_player

test_cases.question: What are the names of poker players in descending order of earnings?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT T1.Name FROM people AS T1 JOIN poker_player AS T2 ON T1.People_ID  =  T2.People_ID ORDER BY T2.Earnings DESC

test_cases.question: Which district has both stores with less than 3000 products and stores with more than 10000 products?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT district FROM shop WHERE Number_products  <  3000 INTERSECT SELECT district FROM shop WHERE Number_products  >  10000

test_cases.question: In 1980, how many cars were made?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT count(*) FROM CARS_DATA WHERE YEAR  =  1980;

test_cases.question: What are the names of conductors who have conducted orchestras founded after the year 2008?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT T1.Name FROM conductor AS T1 JOIN orchestra AS T2 ON T1.Conductor_ID  =  T2.Conductor_ID WHERE Year_of_Founded  >  2008

test_cases.question: Please show the most common citizenship of singers.
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT Citizenship FROM singer GROUP BY Citizenship ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1

test_cases.question: What is the name of the semester with no students enrolled?
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT semester_name FROM Semesters WHERE semester_id NOT IN( SELECT semester_id FROM Student_Enrolment )

test_cases.question: find the id of tv channels that do not play any cartoon directed by Ben Jones.
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT id FROM TV_Channel EXCEPT SELECT channel FROM cartoon WHERE directed_by  =  'Ben Jones'
